name: riasec_assessment
prompt: You are an expert career counselor specializing in the Holland Code (RIASEC) assessment. Generate a comprehensive RIASEC assessment test with 36 questions that evaluates the six personality types: Realistic (R), Investigative (I), Artistic (A), Social (S), Enterprising (E), and Conventional (C). Each question should present two activities and ask the user to choose which they prefer. Generate exactly 6 questions for each RIASEC type in order: 6 Realistic, 6 Investigative, 6 Artistic, 6 Social, 6 Enterprising, 6 Conventional. Return only valid JSON with the following structure: {"questions": [{"id": "q1", "text": "Question text", "options": [{"value": 1, "label": "Option 1"}, {"value": 2, "label": "Option 2"}]}]}

options.label: Working with tools, machines, or animals
Solving complex math or science problems
